info.title: Mock API
info.summary: Full-featured mock REST API for testing, prototyping, and frontend development
info.description:
## Overview

Zero-dependency, in-memory REST API with **11 interconnected resources**, authentication, webhooks, real-time events, and comprehensive query capabilities.

## Features

- **Full CRUD** on all resources with proper HTTP semantics
- **Filtering** by any field with operators: `_gte`, `_lte`, `_gt`, `_lt`, `_ne`, `_like`
- **Full-text search** via `?q=` across all fields
- **Sorting**: `?_sort=field1,field2&_order=desc,asc`
- **Pagination** with `Link` headers (page or slice-based)
- **Relations**: `?_expand=user` (parent) and `?_embed=comments` (children)
- **Field selection**: `?_fields=id,name,email`
- **Authentication** with Bearer tokens (any password works)
- **Webhooks** with event subscriptions and delivery history
- **SSE streaming** for real-time events
- **Batch operations** for multiple requests in one call
- **Testing aids**: `?_error=500`, `?_delay=2000`, `/status/:code`, `/echo`
- **ETag** conditional requests
- **Rate limiting**: 120 req/60s per IP

tags.name: users
tags.description: User accounts, profiles, authentication, and management. Each user has an address, company info, and role-based access.

tags.name: posts
tags.description: Blog posts and articles. Posts belong to users, can have comments, and support full-text search.

tags.name: comments
tags.description: Comments and discussions. Comments belong to both a post and a user.

tags.name: todos
tags.description: Task management and to-do tracking. Todos belong to users and support priority levels.

tags.name: albums
tags.description: Photo album collections. Albums belong to users and contain photos.

tags.name: photos
tags.description: Photos and image assets. Photos belong to albums.

tags.name: categories
tags.description: Product categorization and taxonomy. Categories contain products.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Product catalog with pricing, stock management, and image galleries. Products belong to categories.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Order processing and fulfillment. Orders belong to users and contain product items.

tags.name: reviews
tags.description: Product reviews and ratings. Reviews belong to both a product and a user.

tags.name: notifications
tags.description: Notification management. Notifications belong to users.

tags.name: webhooks
tags.description: Event subscriptions. Register URLs to receive POST notifications on resource changes. Deliveries are simulated for safe testing.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Authentication and tokens. Mock — any password works. Tokens expire in 1 hour.

tags.name: utils
tags.description: Testing utilities: echo, delay, status codes, random data, SSE, batch, upload mock.

tags.name: database
tags.description: Database management: reset, re-seed, export, statistics.

get.description: Paginated list of users. Supports filtering, range operators (`_gte`, `_lte`, `_gt`, `_lt`, `_ne`, `_like`), full-text search, sorting, field selection, and relation expansion.

post.description: Create a new user. Fields `id`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt` are auto-generated. Triggers `users.created` webhook.

get.description: Retrieve a single user. Supports ETag conditional requests via `If-None-Match`.

put.description: Full replacement. All mutable fields overwritten. Triggers `users.updated` webhook.

patch.description: Partial update — only provided fields change. Triggers `users.updated` webhook.

delete.description: Permanently remove a user. Returns deleted resource. Triggers `users.deleted` webhook.

get.description: Retrieve user's posts. Same filtering, sorting, and pagination as `/posts`.
Retrieve user's comments. Same filtering, sorting, and pagination as `/comments`.
Retrieve user's tasks. Same filtering, sorting, and pagination as `/todos`.
Retrieve user's albums. Same filtering, sorting, and pagination as `/albums`.
Retrieve user's orders. Same filtering, sorting, and pagination as `/orders`.
Retrieve user's reviews. Same filtering, sorting, and pagination as `/reviews`.
Retrieve user's notifications. Same filtering, sorting, and pagination as `/notifications`.
Retrieve post's comments. Same filtering, sorting, and pagination as `/comments`.
Retrieve album's photos. Same filtering, sorting, and pagination as `/photos`.
Retrieve category's products. Same filtering, sorting, and pagination as `/products`.
Retrieve product's reviews. Same filtering, sorting, and pagination as `/reviews`.

post.description: Create account and receive token. Returns 409 if email exists.
Authenticate with email/password. **Mock: any password works.** Token valid 1 hour.
Exchange valid token for new one. Old token revoked.

get.description: Returns profile for the provided Bearer token.

post.description: Revoke the Bearer token.
Subscribe URL to events. Patterns: `*` (all), `users.*`, `*.created`, `users.created`. Deliveries are simulated (logged, not sent).

delete.description: Remove webhook and all delivery records.

get.description: Delivery log for a webhook — event, payload, simulated response, timing.

post.description: Trigger simulated `webhook.test` event.

get.description: Mirror request back as JSON.
Test error handling with any status code.
Wait N ms before responding. Test timeouts and loading states.

post.description: Simulates upload — no actual file storage.

get.description: Server-Sent Events — 1 event/sec, max 50. Test real-time UI and EventSource.

post.description: Up to 20 operations in one request, executed sequentially.
Regenerate all data, clear tokens/webhooks/deliveries.
Regenerate with custom counts.

get.description: Full database as JSON. May be large.

post.description: Fired when a user is created.

Webhook.description: Webhook subscription for receiving event notifications via HTTP POST callbacks

url.description: Endpoint URL to receive webhook POST requests

secret.description: Shared secret for HMAC-SHA256 signature verification

WebhookInput.description: Data for creating or updating a webhook

WebhookDelivery.description: Record of a webhook delivery attempt (simulated — no actual HTTP requests)

data.description: Full resource object at time of event

AuthResponse.description: Authentication response with user profile and token

SeedRequest.description: Custom counts for re-seeding. Omitted resources use defaults.

SearchParam.name: q
SearchParam.description: Full-text search across all string/number/array fields

FieldsParam.name: _fields
FieldsParam.description: Sparse fieldset — comma-separated fields to return

ExpandParam.name: _expand
ExpandParam.description: Expand parent relations inline (e.g., `user` on posts)

DelayParam.name: _delay
DelayParam.description: Artificial delay in ms (max 10000) — test loading states

ErrorParam.name: _error
ErrorParam.description: Force error response (400–599) — test error handling

Link.description: Pagination links per RFC 8288 (first, prev, next, last)

bearerAuth.description: Obtain via `POST /auth/login`. Include as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. Expires in 1 hour. Most endpoints work without auth.
